C1.descriptionTemplate: Arachne gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: {Annihilation} is changed to: choose 1 Command Card from {Ultra Space}, take it out and make it trigger twice the next time it is played, and make the next played Command Card trigger {Dimension Shuttle}.

C4.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] {Final Verdict} to all enemies, then generate 1 {Guiding Strings} and place it into hand.

C5.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Other Awakeners gain [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. The next {Eternal Loom} generates an additional {Guiding Strings} and places it into the Draw Pile and Discard Pile.

Exalt.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield and Temporary DMG Amplification +[Arg2], removing {Stagnation} from all cards in hand. {Singularity Warp}: For the rest of this turn, whenever another Awakener plays a Command Card, consume 1 {Weaver} to unleash {Pursuit}: {Infinite Threads}.

OverExalt.descriptionTemplate: Generate up to 5 Temporary Base Copies of all cards with {Singularity Beacon} in hand and {Ultra Space}, randomly place them into the Draw Pile or Discard Pile, and set their Arithmetica Cost to 0.

T1.descriptionTemplate:
When Arachne is in the team, the {Ultra} Realm reweaves into {Singularity: Ultra}.
{Dimension Shuttle}: After playing the first Command Card each turn, move a Temporary Base Copy of it to {Ultra Space}. Grant the original and the copy 25 stacks of {Singularity Beacon}. This cannot trigger during {Ultra} Rounds.
{Singularity Beacon}: Each stack increases Final DMG, {STR}/{Tentacle DMG} Generation, and Fixed {Poison}/{Counter} effects by 2%. Increases Final Shield, HP Recovery, and {STR⯆} effects by 1%. Removed after play. Cards with this effect cannot trigger {Dimension Shuttle}.
{Ultra Space}: When full, ending the turn activates {Ultra Space} immediately instead of initiating an {Ultra Round}: Discard all non-{Retain} cards, trigger their {Fleeting} effects, draw all {Ultra Space} cards, and set Arithmetica to 5. This current turn is treated as an {Ultra Round}.
{Singularity Annihilation}: Draw the leftmost card from {Ultra Space}. 3 turns cooldown.
Upon starting exploration, the team gains +50% DMG Amplification and 15 stacks of {Singularity Prism}.
{Singularity Prism}: All Command Cards gain {Singularity Beacon} bonuses equal to these stacks.
{Ultra} Mastery: For each 1 point of Realm Mastery, {Singularity Beacon} stacks from {Singularity Prism} and {Dimension Shuttle} increase by 0.05%.
Pure {Ultra}: If the team consists only of {Ultra} or {Chaos} Awakeners, the {Ultra} Mastery effect and Realm DMG Amplification are doubled.

T2.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

T3.descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF are increased by [Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Arachne deals +[Arg3]% {Final Verdict}. The {Final Verdict} dealt to Mutant enemies is doubled.

E1.descriptionTemplate: Arachne's Exalt grants +25% Temporary DMG Amplification. For every point of Realm Mastery provided by Arachne and her equipped WoD & Covenant, the Temporary DMG Amplification additionally +0.25%.

E2.descriptionTemplate: {Eternal Loom} deals +50% {Final Verdict}. {Fate-Binding Web} gains {Prepare} and {Retain}.

E3.descriptionTemplate: {Weaver} stack cap increases from 3 to 5, and {Singularity Prism} gained from {Infinite Threads} is doubled.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: The Fate {Weaver} draws her threads. Max 5 stacks, persist across battles, and can be consumed by Exalt to unleash {Pursuit}: {Infinite Threads}.

AbsoluteAxiom.descriptionTemplate: {Rouse} {Puppet Stage Unveiled} is enhanced: After triggering {Annihilation}, immediately deal {Fixed DMG} equal to 50% {Final Verdict} to all enemies. The DMG Amplification and Shield gained from the next Exalt +50%.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Arachne gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: {Annihilation} is changed to: choose 1 Command Card from {Ultra Space}, take it out and make it trigger twice the next time it is played, and make the next played Command Card trigger {Dimension Shuttle}. After using {Annihilation}, immediately deal {Fixed DMG} equal to 50% {Final Verdict} to all enemies, and the DMG Amplification and Shield gained from the next Exalt +50%.

derivedSkills.descriptionTemplate: Lose 2% Max HP, gain 1 stack of {Weaver}. This battle, HP lost from {Guiding Strings} and {Final Verdict} dealt by Arachne +10%. {Fleeting}: Arachne randomly gains 15-30 Aliemus.
Gain [Arg1] stacks of {Singularity Prism}, deal [Damage:Arg2] {Final Verdict} to the enemy with lowest HP.
